subject: [PATCH v4 6/9] dax: plumb hotplug online_type through dax

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability for drivers using dax_kmem to specify an auto-online policy when creating DAX devices. It does this by adding an 'online_type' field to the dev_dax_data structure, which can be set to a specific memory hotplug online type. This allows drivers to choose their preferred auto-online policy instead of relying on the system default. The patch makes no functional changes to existing callers and is intended to provide more flexibility for DAX device creation.
